title: Ozophyllum
taxonomy: Ozophyllum is classified as a genus of flowering plants in the family Celastraceae. This family is commonly known as the bittersweet or staff vine family. The Celastraceae family is part of the larger order Celastrales, which is a group of flowering plants that are primarily found in the Northern Hemisphere. Ozophyllum is native to parts of Asia and is known for its unique and diverse species. The classification of Ozophyllum is still being studied and refined by botanists to better understand its relationship to other plant species within the Celastraceae family.
